brand_dna.category: Australian water filtration brand selling home water coolers, filters, and complete filtration systems.
brand_dna.core_belief: Clean, better water for every Australian home - built around whole-home filtration and removing what you do not want in your water, including forever chemicals and fluoride.
proof_points: Registered brand (Awesome Water®) with a dedicated product range across coolers, filters, and whole-house systems
Price Beat Guarantee stated in site navigation
24 Hour Help Line & Repair Manual for support
Physical retail and service presence across major Australian cities (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide and more)
brand_dna.positioning: Practical, value-conscious specialist in home water filtration - broad product depth and local support rather than a single premium hero product.

voice_pillars.name: Confident Category Leader
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks in plain, bold superlatives that position products as the best available choice.
voice_pillars.quote: No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market

voice_pillars.name: Whole-Home Practical
voice_pillars.desc: Frames products as complete, everyday household solutions rather than gadgets.

voice_pillars.name: Problem-Solver Direct
voice_pillars.desc: Names the exact contaminant or need the buyer wants gone, in blunt terms.

voice_pillars.name: Value-Reassuring
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with price confidence and easy support to lower purchase risk.

phrases: No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market

icp: Australian homeowners who care about the quality of their tap water and want a reliable, well-supported filtration or cooler system without overpaying.

personas.name: Health-Conscious Household
personas.description: Parents and families who want fluoride and forever chemicals out of their drinking water and respond to clear removal claims and whole-home coverage.

personas.name: Value-Seeking Buyer
personas.description: Comparison shoppers who need reassurance on price and are moved by the Price Beat Guarantee and showroom/sale pricing.

personas.name: Convenience Upgrader
personas.description: Buyers who want instant hot/cold or sparkling water at home and are drawn to multi-function coolers and dispensers.

allowed.claim: Complete home water filtration systems for the whole house.
Filters designed to remove forever chemicals.

allowed.source: product catalog - 1 Year Fluoride Filtration Bundle

allowed.claim: 24 Hour Help Line and repair support available.
3 in 1 units combining ice maker with hot and cold dispensing.
allowed.source: product page - 3 in 1 Ice Maker + Hot/Cold Dispenser

banned.claim: Calling the products 'eco-friendly' or 'sustainable' without qualification.
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim needs specific verifiable backing.
FTC Green Guides - environmental benefit claim with no verifiable evidence.

banned.claim: Filtered water 'cures', 'treats' or 'relieves' any illness or health condition.
banned.why: Prohibited medical/health claim not supported by the site.

banned.claim: '100% removes all contaminants' or absolute purity guarantees.
banned.why: Unqualified absolute claim not backed by stated testing on the site.

banned.claim: Drinking this water 'improves posture', 'reduces pain' or similar body claims.
banned.why: Banned medical/orthopedic-style claim for this category.

banned.claim: '100% recycled' materials in units without proof.
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - recycled-content claim requires specific verifiable backing.
